title: Killing Sacred Cows
author: Garrett B. Gunderson & Stephen Palmer
subline: Overcoming the financial myths destroying your prosperity.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- 5 cows in a row, each labeled with a financial myth. The middle cow (myth #3) has a red X through it. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 1600)" fill="none">
    <!-- Cow 1: silhouette of a cow facing right, simple shapes -->
    <g transform="translate(180 0)">
      <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="80" ry="50"/>
        <line x1="-80" y1="20" x2="-80" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="20" x2="-50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="50" y1="20" x2="50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="80" y1="20" x2="80" y2="80"/>
        <ellipse cx="-70" cy="-30" rx="20" ry="15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-15" x2="-30" y2="-15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-25" x2="-30" y2="-25"/>
        <line x1="-90" y1="-20" x2="-100" y2="-50"/>
        <line x1="-70" y1="-30" x2="-80" y2="-55"/>
      </g>
      <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SAVINGS</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(460 0)">
      <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="80" ry="50"/>
        <line x1="-80" y1="20" x2="-80" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="20" x2="-50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="50" y1="20" x2="50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="80" y1="20" x2="80" y2="80"/>
        <ellipse cx="-70" cy="-30" rx="20" ry="15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-15" x2="-30" y2="-15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-25" x2="-30" y2="-25"/>
        <line x1="-90" y1="-20" x2="-100" y2="-50"/>
        <line x1="-70" y1="-30" x2="-80" y2="-55"/>
      </g>
      <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">DEBT</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Cow 3: RED, X'd out -->
    <g transform="translate(740 0)">
      <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="80" ry="50"/>
        <line x1="-80" y1="20" x2="-80" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="20" x2="-50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="50" y1="20" x2="50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="80" y1="20" x2="80" y2="80"/>
        <ellipse cx="-70" cy="-30" rx="20" ry="15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-15" x2="-30" y2="-15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-25" x2="-30" y2="-25"/>
        <line x1="-90" y1="-20" x2="-100" y2="-50"/>
        <line x1="-70" y1="-30" x2="-80" y2="-55"/>
      </g>
      <!-- The X -->
      <line x1="-100" y1="-90" x2="100" y2="80" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="5"/>
      <line x1="100" y1="-90" x2="-100" y2="80" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="5"/>
      <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">RETIREMENT</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(1020 0)">
      <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="80" ry="50"/>
        <line x1="-80" y1="20" x2="-80" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="20" x2="-50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="50" y1="20" x2="50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="80" y1="20" x2="80" y2="80"/>
        <ellipse cx="-70" cy="-30" rx="20" ry="15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-15" x2="-30" y2="-15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-25" x2="-30" y2="-25"/>
        <line x1="-90" y1="-20" x2="-100" y2="-50"/>
        <line x1="-70" y1="-30" x2="-80" y2="-55"/>
      </g>
      <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">BUDGET</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(1300 0)">
      <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="80" ry="50"/>
        <line x1="-80" y1="20" x2="-80" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="20" x2="-50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="50" y1="20" x2="50" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="80" y1="20" x2="80" y2="80"/>
        <ellipse cx="-70" cy="-30" rx="20" ry="15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-15" x2="-30" y2="-15"/>
        <line x1="-50" y1="-25" x2="-30" y2="-25"/>
        <line x1="-90" y1="-20" x2="-100" y2="-50"/>
        <line x1="-70" y1="-30" x2="-80" y2="-55"/>
      </g>
      <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">DIVERSIFY</text>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2050" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">A LIE IS STILL A LIE, EVEN IF MILLIONS BELIEVE IT</text>
</svg>
rationale: Five identical hairline cow silhouettes in a row, each labeled with a different financial myth (savings, debt, retirement, budget, diversify). The middle one — 'RETIREMENT' — is the sacred cow, rendered in red 2.5px stroke and crossed out with a thick red X. Title 320px uppercase, two lines, weight 500. The visual: row of cows, one slayed.
